label: Now Developing
items: Balikatan 2026 opened with 17,000 troops as Manila openly framed alliance drills around deterrence and possible spillover from a China-Taiwan crisis.
Two accountability tracks hardened at once: Sara Duterte’s impeachment fight moved into suspicious-transaction territory, while the flood-control scandal reached Martin Romualdez’s frozen assets.
The week’s lived-pressure stories were still concrete and expensive: Middle East repatriation passed 7,400, airfares rose under Level 19 fuel surcharges, and PAGASA raised its El Nino alert to 79%.
